action.reasoning: Observation: CLIP ViT-B/16 5-epoch baseline achieved 21.57% Quickdraw accuracy (best so far, beating published ~17%). Validation accuracy 79.73%, loss still declining at epoch 5 (0.85). Analysis: CLIP's vision-language pretrained features are far superior for the extreme Quickdraw domain gap; longer training with regularization (mixup, label smoothing, RandAugment) and per-domain validation tracking (saving best by sketch accuracy) could push higher. Decision: Train CLIP for 20 epochs with mixup=0.2, label_smoothing=0.1, RandAugment if available, DDP mixed precision, and save best checkpoint based on sketch validation accuracy. Expect ~77 min; well within time budget. Submit eval immediately after training to save iteration.
